seoTitle: Barragup vs Barrow Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Barragup and Barrow Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Barragup vs Barrow Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barragup and Barrow Island.
heading: Barragup vs Barrow Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barragup, Western Australia and Barrow Island, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barrow Island has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Barragup (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barragup or Barrow Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barragup has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Barrow Island scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barragup scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Barrow Island scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barragup or Barrow Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barrow Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
